ticket.title: Add multi-user accounts and shared workspaces
ticket.description: Friends want their own logins inside the same TaskFlow instance and a way to share tasks across accounts.

recordedFinalText: {"files":[{"path":"proposal.md","content":"# Multi-user accounts — out of scope\n\nThe project description explicitly lists multi-user accounts as out of scope. This change cannot be drafted without a project-level scope decision; the specifier should not silently expand the product surface."},{"path":"tasks.md","content":"- [ ] Pending operator decision on whether to expand product scope"}],"openQuestions":["PROJECT.md lists multi-user accounts as 'out of scope, do not implement'. Does this ticket overrule that, and if so who owns the scope change?","If we proceed: what is the auth boundary — local users only, or external IdP? The current single-user bearer-token model has no notion of identity provider.","Sharing semantics: per-task ACL, per-tag ACL, or per-workspace? Each implies a different schema migration path."],"assumptions":[],"risks":[]}
